title: Create: Broken Bad ReBroken
description: This mod is an addon to Create which enables the player to produce and sell new chemicals, this is a continuation of the original.
body:
# Create: Broken Bad

[![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de7f2f606702569cd98fc1f6a0b29dbf817dd870.png)](https://discord.gg/yA9Uk8a4WV)


Adds stuff based off the famous show **Breaking Bad** into Minecraft.


## Features
Adds many new recipes and items to make your the _beeeessstttt_ chemicals!
Make a full production line involving many chemicals to produce the stuff.
Sell to villagers for up to 12 emeralds.

## Credits

Fabric:
- **Ported to Fabric**: [Exzotic5485](https://github.com/Exzotic5485)
- **Original Creation**: [jetpacker06](https://github.com/jetpacker06)
- **Rebalancing and Fixes**: [iSeeEthan](https://github.com/iSeeEthan)

NeoForge:
- **Original Creation**: [jetpacker06](https://github.com/jetpacker06)
- **Ported to NeoForge**: [iSeeEthan](https://github.com/iSeeEthan)

  
## Languages
- English
- Spanish
- German
- More

**THIS IS A CONTINUATION AND NOT THE ORGINAL MOD [FORGE 1.20.1 ORGINAL MOD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad)**

**SUPPORT HIM [HERE](https://buymeacoffee.com/jetpacker06)**
